Join the Movement

Smart Villages & Urban Farming

Rooted in community mobilization, we are building sustainable ecosystems. From rural infrastructure maintenance to thriving rooftop gardens in the heart of the city.

Community Mobilization

Empowering local communities to take charge of their infrastructure. From maintaining vital water sources to supporting local schools.

water_drop

Water Source Maintenance

Ensuring clean and reliable access to water through community-led infrastructure upkeep.

Read Story arrow_forward
school

School Support Networks

Building robust support systems for local education, ensuring resources reach the classroom.

Read Story arrow_forward
add_road

Road Infrastructure

Coordinating local efforts to maintain critical access roads, connecting villages to wider markets.

Read Story arrow_forward

A greener city begins with a single living space.

Transform your balcony, rooftop, or tiny backyard into a thriving source of nutrition. Our urban farming guides provide practical, scalable solutions for limited spaces.

  • check

    Vertical Gardening

    Maximize vertical space with tiered planters and climbing trellises.

  • check

    Container Mastery

    Select the right soil blends and self-watering containers for urban environments.

  • check

    Composting in Small Spaces

    Odorless bokashi bins and worm farms perfect for apartment living.

eco

1,200+

Active Urban Plots

About Us

Rooted in Tradition, Growing for the Future. The Bill of Senga is a sustainable living hub where indigenous knowledge meets modern agricultural science to build thriving ecosystems.
